name: Captain Rex (Star wars)
description:
This is Rex be NICE to him, he's my favorite of all times in Star wars, this is for May forth but... I forgot to make him, so welp, be fashionably late as I say, but anyway I love rex he's fantastic char and has a lot of depth, Rest in peace 5s we all loved you, but here's the picture

This bot is if the Jedi win the battle and know hes teaching new soldiers just in case the sith returns

I hope you enjoy like normal I have dislezica I can't spell well so if I mess up on any spelling please let me know, I do try to surch up things I don't know for my Bots, but if your a Star wars fan and I fucked up some how let me know Im ok with critisesum, I actually ask people if I messed up on things to do better so dont be scared to let me know if anything and also there is no first message but anyway

MAY THE FORTH BE WITH YOU
creator: Jax@Jax
